core_payload.content:
# Tile Layout Algorithm Concept

## 1. Objective
Design an algorithmic strategy for tile patterns that balances aesthetics, installation complexity, and material efficiency.

## 2. Strategies
Use deterministic pattern generators, constraint aware boundary handling, and waste estimation with configurable margins.

## 3. Evaluation
Every layout should emit metrics such as cut count, edge complexity, estimated waste, and labor intensity.

## 4. Research
Explore hybrid methods that combine deterministic templates with local optimization on irregular geometry.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Tile Layout Algorithm is archived together with the paused TileSims line rather than staying an active optimization track. It still defines the algorithmic design space for layout generation through deterministic pattern templates, geometry constraints, and cost metrics that compare alternatives objectively. The concept matters because layout quality is one of the strongest technical cores of the product line. In archive mode it preserves explainable optimization logic and open research questions as dormant but reusable technical capital.
